commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Human review is required because the PR has a protected maintainer label, is currently dirty/unmergeable, and changes fail-closed install policy plus stored trust metadata.; Needs attention: The hardening direction is security-positive, but the new fail-closed ClawHub trust endpoint is a security boundary that needs maintainer acceptance before merge. commands.review_summary:
The PR adds ClawHub exact-release trust checks and risk acknowledgement flows across plugin and skill install/update paths, Gateway/UI error propagation, install metadata, docs, and focused tests.

PR surface: Source +2530, Tests +4336, Docs +38, Other +21. Total +6925 across 70 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a current-main bug reproduction. This is security hardening, and current-main source inspection shows the missing install-boundary gate rather than a failing runtime repro.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is required because the PR has a protected maintainer label, is currently dirty/unmergeable, and changes fail-closed install policy plus stored trust metadata.
